title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Imu, Okobore Town Villagers, Tama, Luffy, Holdem as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Okobore Town Villagers
dialogue.text: This is me repaying the food

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: And it's just the begin- ning!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oi! Save some meat for me, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes. This is a rather public failure, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Three rather troublesome characters were present.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I doubt even I would have been able to...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: TAMA... Don't let just this satisfy ya.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'll make this your every day!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: By the time we leave this country,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll make it a place where you can eat your fill every day!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The next time we come to this country,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll make it one where you can eat your fill!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: N-NO! Of course'n not! I'm so happy! Just... surprised.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: right, then. They'll be after us for real, now. Get ready.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want to hear that from you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to the ruins of open castle! On that peak.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Yeah. I was pretty shocked, too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The names carved there... What is the truth behind all this?!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 40 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
